ref: Jour: Radiation Physics and Chemistry, Vol.225, p.112157 (2024)
title: Neutron-induced reaction cross section measurements for palladium isotopes at 14.77+/-0.17 MeV with covariance analysis

x4freetext: for palladium isotopes at 14.77+/-0.17 MeV with

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Radiation Physics and Chemistry, Vol.225, p.112157 (2024)

x4freetext: deuterium ion beam current on 8 Ci tritium target
Two PdCl2 samples (99.9% purity) with masses of 0.504 g
(S1) and 0.510 g (S2) were measured using a
microbalance ensuring an accuracy of (+/-10 ug).
Each sample was sealed in a folded polyethylene
enclosure (~10 mm X 10 mm) to retain recoil nuclei and
subsequently wrapped in (0.167 g mass, 99.9% pure)
Al foil serving as a neutron flux monitor.
Relative efficiency of 30% and 1.5 keV energy
resolution at a gamma energy of 1.33 MeV
